# Pitch My CV
> AI-assisted resume optimization platform with an ATS checker, resume examples, role-specific career guides, practical blog resources, and clear trust documentation for job seekers.

## Main Pages
- [Homepage](https://pitchcv.app/): Match a resume to a target job and identify missing keywords, weak structure, and ATS risks before applying.
- [Pricing](https://pitchcv.app/pricing): Subscription plans for ATS scans, AI resume optimization, job tailoring, and export features.
- [ATS Resume Checker](https://pitchcv.app/tools/ats-checker): Free ATS-focused resume checker that highlights parsing issues, missing keywords, and weak bullet writing.
- [Search](https://pitchcv.app/search): Search page for guides, examples, legal documents, and ATS resources across the site.

## Career Guides
- [Career Guides Hub](https://pitchcv.app/careers): Directory of role-specific resume guides focused on ATS performance and recruiter expectations.
- [Data Analyst Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/data-analyst-resume): Resume guidance for analyst roles with emphasis on SQL, dashboards, stakeholder support, and measurable business outcomes.
- [Software Engineer Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/software-engineer-resume): ATS and recruiter guidance for software engineering resumes with delivery, architecture, and reliability examples.
- [Product Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/product-manager-resume): Resume guidance for product roles with prioritization, roadmap, experimentation, and launch metrics.
- [Project Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/project-manager-resume): Project delivery guidance focused on scope control, risk management, and execution quality.
- [Business Analyst Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/business-analyst-resume): Resume guidance for analysis roles with requirements quality, process improvement, and stakeholder alignment.
- [Marketing Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/marketing-manager-resume): Marketing leadership resume guidance with CAC, pipeline, and campaign outcomes.
- [Digital Marketing Specialist Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/digital-marketing-specialist-resume): Resume guidance for digital marketers with channel optimization and performance marketing examples.
- [Sales Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/sales-manager-resume): Resume guidance for quota, team leadership, forecast accuracy, and coaching impact.
- [Account Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/account-manager-resume): Resume guidance for retention, expansion, and client relationship management.
- [Customer Success Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/customer-success-manager-resume): Resume guidance for adoption, renewal confidence, and customer health outcomes.
- [Financial Analyst Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/financial-analyst-resume): Resume guidance for forecasting, planning, variance analysis, and financial impact.
- [Accountant Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/accountant-resume): Resume guidance for close cycles, controls, reporting quality, and compliance.
- [Investment Analyst Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/investment-analyst-resume): Resume guidance for valuation, research depth, and investment recommendation quality.
- [Operations Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/operations-manager-resume): Resume guidance for process ownership, KPI improvement, and team leadership.
- [Supply Chain Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/supply-chain-manager-resume): Resume guidance for planning quality, service levels, and supply resilience.
- [Construction Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/construction-manager-resume): Resume guidance for safety, schedule, budget control, and site execution.
- [Civil Engineer Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/civil-engineer-resume): Resume guidance for infrastructure delivery, standards, and compliance depth.
- [Mechanical Engineer Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/mechanical-engineer-resume): Resume guidance for product development, validation, and manufacturing fit.
- [Electrical Engineer Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/electrical-engineer-resume): Resume guidance for power, electronics, commissioning, and code-based work.
- [HR Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/hr-manager-resume): Resume guidance for people operations, compliance, and employee relations.

## Resume Examples
- [Resume Examples Hub](https://pitchcv.app/examples): Directory of downloadable resume examples and template guidance by specialty.
- [Software Engineer Resume Example](https://pitchcv.app/examples/software-engineer): Example resume page with summary, skills, and impact-writing examples for software engineering roles.
- [Product Manager Resume Example](https://pitchcv.app/examples/product-manager): Example resume page for product management roles.
- [Marketing Manager Resume Example](https://pitchcv.app/examples/marketing-manager): Example resume page for marketing leadership roles.
- [Digital Marketing Resume Example](https://pitchcv.app/examples/digital-marketing): Example resume page for digital marketing roles.
- [Content Writer Resume Example](https://pitchcv.app/examples/content-writer): Example resume page for content writer roles.
- [Event Planner Resume Example](https://pitchcv.app/examples/event-planner): Example resume page for event planner roles.
- [Data Scientist Resume Example](https://pitchcv.app/examples/data-scientist): Example resume page for data scientist roles.
- [Sales Manager Resume Example](https://pitchcv.app/examples/sales-manager): Example resume page for sales manager roles.

## Guides and Articles
- [Blog](https://pitchcv.app/blog): Collection page for ATS resume guides, keyword strategy resources, and hiring-market advice.
- [ATS Resume Checklist](https://pitchcv.app/ats-resume-checklist): Long-form checklist for ATS-safe structure, keyword coverage, recruiter readability, and final validation.
- [ATS Resume Mistakes](https://pitchcv.app/ats-resume-mistakes): Long-form guide to common ATS failures and practical fixes.
- [Resume Keyword Optimization](https://pitchcv.app/resume-keyword-optimization): Guide to extracting, prioritizing, placing, and validating job-specific resume keywords.
- [Viral Resume Case](https://pitchcv.app/resume-pelmeni-case): Commentary article on a meme resume case and the safer alternative of structured ATS optimization.

## Trust and Legal
- [About](https://pitchcv.app/about): Company mission, methodology, editorial standards, and trust information for Pitch My CV.
- [Contact](https://pitchcv.app/contact): Support, privacy, partnership, and company contact details.
- [Privacy Policy](https://pitchcv.app/privacy): Privacy commitments, lawful bases, retention logic, and rights for users.
- [Data Processing Policy](https://pitchcv.app/data-processing): Data processing details, retention periods, and transfer safeguards.
- [Public Offer](https://pitchcv.app/terms): Subscription and service terms for Pitch My CV.

## Editorial and Trust Signals
- [About the Editorial Team](https://pitchcv.app/about#editorial-standards): Methodology and editorial process used to create ATS and resume optimization guides.
- [Privacy Requests](https://pitchcv.app/contact#privacy-requests): Contact path for data requests and privacy-related questions.
- [Support Requests](https://pitchcv.app/contact#support-requests): Contact path for customer support and product questions.
